title: Find the Anemacilus
description: Its time to go on a journey. A whole new world awaits you, with treasures hidden everywhere! Check under every stone and bush. Maybe this treasure is guarded by a dragon? Stroll through the plains of the city of freedom; visit the islands where cherry blossoms bloom; explore the jungle in the domain of the Archon of Wisdom. Everywhere you can find mysterious mysterious objects. Collect them all and get a meeting with your favorite characters as a reward!
instructions: Depending on the gaming device a computer mouse click or a simple touch on touch screens is used for control
